name: CHA Internal Citation Graph
description: Internal CHA / Alexanarch citation graph. Edges extracted from deposit texts via five mechanisms: doi_resolution (legacy Zenodo DOI patterns), axn_reference (full canonical AXN), axn_hex_reference (AXN-<HEX> short form), ea_id_reference (sovereign EA-* document IDs), deposit_number_reference (bare #N). Generated by scripts/citation_extractor.py — see /api/enrichment-protocol.json.
